sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92233" key="r(axetri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥᾰχετρ-ίζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥάχις</etym>) <sense id="n92233.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cut through the spine</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:136" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.136</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥακετρίζω</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
